platform_stat_t(3) Library Functions Manual platform_stat_t(3)

NAME

platform_stat_t - File type information from stat().

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/platform/filesystem.h>

Data Fields


size_t size
File size in bytes. int mode
File mode (permissions and type). int is_regular_file
Non-zero if file is a regular file. int is_directory
Non-zero if file is a directory. int is_symlink
Non-zero if file is a symbolic link.

Detailed Description

File type information from stat().

Structure containing file metadata returned by platform_stat().

Definition at line 232 of file filesystem.h.

Field Documentation

int platform_stat_t::is_directory

Non-zero if file is a directory.

Definition at line 236 of file filesystem.h.

Non-zero if file is a regular file.

Definition at line 235 of file filesystem.h.

int platform_stat_t::is_symlink

Non-zero if file is a symbolic link.

Definition at line 237 of file filesystem.h.

File mode (permissions and type).

File size in bytes.

Definition at line 233 of file filesystem.h.
